description_long: This is a tall, narrow filing cabinet with a rectangular shape and a slightly overhanging top surface. The front features five vertically stacked drawers, each equipped with a metallic handle and a rectangular label holder, giving it a utilitarian and organized appearance. The cabinet is finished in a muted brown color with a slightly distressed texture, suggesting it is made of metal with a matte coating. The sides and back are plain, lacking any handles or decorative features, emphasizing its functional design. The overall build appears sturdy and robust, suitable for storing documents or small items securely. This type of cabinet is commonly found in offices, archives, or storage rooms in urban environments.
description: A tall, brown metal filing cabinet with five drawers, each featuring a metallic handle and label holder. The design is utilitarian and robust, ideal for organized storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with metallic handles and label holders.
description_view_1: Back view, plain and featureless with a flat brown surface.
description_view_2: Side view, showing the cabinet's depth and plain, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side with no visible features.
